udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for Merkle tree persistent data
udt_union_v0.name: MerkleDataKey

void_v0.doc: Number of levels in the Merkle tree
void_v0.name: Levels

void_v0.doc: Current position in the root history ring buffer
void_v0.name: CurrentRootIndex

void_v0.doc: Next available index for leaf insertion
void_v0.name: NextIndex

tuple_v0.doc: Subtree hashes at each level (indexed by level)
tuple_v0.name: FilledSubtree

tuple_v0.doc: Zero hash values for each level (indexed by level)
tuple_v0.name: Zeroes

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Contract error types for the privacy pool
udt_error_enum_v0.name: Error

cases.doc: Caller is not authorized to perform this operation
cases.name: NotAuthorized

cases.doc: Merkle tree has reached maximum capacity
cases.name: MerkleTreeFull

cases.doc: Internal error: next leaf index is not even
cases.name: NextIndexNotEven

cases.doc: External amount is invalid (negative or exceeds 2^248)
cases.name: WrongExtAmount

cases.doc: Zero-knowledge proof verification failed or proof is empty
cases.name: InvalidProof

cases.doc: Provided Merkle root is not in the recent history
cases.name: UnknownRoot

cases.doc: Nullifier has already been spent (double-spend attempt)
cases.name: AlreadySpentNullifier

cases.doc: External data hash does not match the provided data
cases.name: WrongExtHash

cases.doc: Public input is not canonical in the BN254 scalar field
cases.name: NonCanonicalPublicInput

udt_struct_v0.doc:
Zero-knowledge proof data for a transaction

Contains all the cryptographic data needed to verify a transaction,
including the proof itself, public inputs, and nullifiers.
udt_struct_v0.name: Proof

fields.doc: Merkle root the policy membership proof was generated against
fields.name: asp_membership_root

fields.doc: Merkle root the policy NON-membership proof was generated against
fields.name: asp_non_membership_root

fields.doc: Hash of the external data (binds proof to transaction parameters)
fields.name: ext_data_hash

fields.doc: Nullifiers for spent input UTXOs (prevents double-spending)
fields.name: input_nullifiers

fields.doc: Commitment for the first output UTXO
fields.name: output_commitment0

fields.doc: Commitment for the second output UTXO
fields.name: output_commitment1

fields.doc: The serialized zero-knowledge proof
fields.name: proof

fields.doc: Net public amount (deposit - withdrawal, modulo field size)
fields.name: public_amount

fields.doc: Merkle root the proof was generated against
fields.name: root

udt_struct_v0.doc:
User account registration data

Used for registering a user's public key to enable encrypted communication
for receiving transfers.
Not required to interact with the pool. But facilitates in-pool transfers
via events. As parties can learn about each other public key.
udt_struct_v0.name: Account

fields.doc: X25519 encryption public key for encrypting note data (32 bytes)
fields.name: encryption_key

fields.doc: BN254 note public key for creating commitments (32 bytes)
fields.name: note_key

fields.doc: Owner address of the account
fields.name: owner

udt_struct_v0.doc:
External data for a transaction

Contains public information about the transaction that is hashed and
included in the zero-knowledge proof to bind the proof to specific
transaction parameters (e.g. recipient address).
udt_struct_v0.name: ExtData

fields.doc: Encrypted data for the first output UTXO
fields.name: encrypted_output0

fields.doc: Encrypted data for the second output UTXO
fields.name: encrypted_output1

fields.doc: External amount: positive for deposits, negative for withdrawals
fields.name: ext_amount

fields.doc: Recipient address for withdrawals
fields.name: recipient

function_v0.doc: Get the latest root of the Merkle tree that defines the pool
function_v0.name: get_root

function_v0.doc:
Register a user's public encryption key

Allows users to publish their public key so others can send them
encrypted outputs for private transfers.
The account owner must authorize this call

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `account` - Account data containing owner address and public key
function_v0.name: register

function_v0.doc:
Execute a shielded transaction with deposit handling

This is the main entry point for users to interact with the pool.
If `ext_amount > 0`, tokens are transferred from the sender to the pool
before processing the transaction.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `proof` - Zero-knowledge proof and public inputs
* `ext_data` - External transaction data
* `sender` - Address of the transaction sender (must authorize funding
transaction)

# Returns

Returns `Ok(())` on success, or an error if validation fails
function_v0.name: transact

event_v0.doc:
Event emitted when a user registers their public keys

This event allows other users to discover keys for sending private
transfers. Two key types are required:
- encryption_key: X25519 key for encrypting note data (amount, blinding)
- note_key: BN254 key for creating commitments in the ZK circuit
event_v0.name: PublicKeyEvent

function_v0.doc:
Update the contract administrator

Transfers administrative control to a new address. Requires
authorization from the current admin.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `new_admin` - New address that will have administrative permissions
function_v0.name: update_admin

event_v0.doc: Event emitted when a nullifier is spent\n\nThis event allows off-chain observers to track which UTXOs have been spent.
event_v0.name: NewNullifierEvent

function_v0.doc:
Constructor: initialize the privacy pool contract

Sets up the contract with the specified token, verifier, and Merkle tree
configuration. This function can only be called once.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `admin` - Address of the contract administrator
* `token` - Address of the token contract for deposits/withdrawals
* `verifier` - Address of the ZK proof verifier contract
* `asp_membership` - Address of the ASP Membership contract
* `asp_non_membership` - Address of the ASP Non-Membership contract
* `maximum_deposit_amount` - Maximum allowed deposit per transaction
* `levels` - Number of levels in the commitment Merkle tree (1-32)

# Returns

Returns `Ok(())` on success, or an error if already initialized or
invalid configuration
function_v0.name: __constructor

function_v0.doc:
Check whether a pool Merkle root is still in the recent root history.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `root` - Pool Merkle root to check
function_v0.name: is_known_root

event_v0.doc:
Event emitted when a new commitment is added to the Merkle tree

This event allows off-chain observers to track new UTXOs and decrypt
outputs intended for them.
event_v0.name: NewCommitmentEvent

params.doc: The commitment hash added to the tree
params.name: commitment

params.doc: Index position in the Merkle tree
params.name: index

params.doc: Encrypted output data (decryptable by the recipient)
params.name: encrypted_output

function_v0.doc:
Update the ASP Membership contract address

Changes the ASP Membership contract address. Requires admin
authorization.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `new_asp_membership` - New ASP Membership contract address
function_v0.name: update_asp_membership

function_v0.doc:
Get the current Merkle root from the ASP Membership contract

Makes a cross-contract call to retrieve the current root of the
membership Merkle tree.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment

# Returns

The current membership Merkle root as U256
function_v0.name: get_asp_membership_root

function_v0.doc:
Update the ASP Non-Membership contract address

Changes the ASP Non-Membership contract address. Requires admin
authorization.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment
* `new_asp_non_membership` - New ASP Non-Membership contract address
function_v0.name: update_asp_non_membership

function_v0.doc:
Get the current Merkle root from the ASP Non-Membership contract

Makes a cross-contract call to retrieve the current root of the
non-membership Sparse Merkle tree.

# Arguments

* `env` - The Soroban environment

# Returns

The current non-membership Merkle root as U256
function_v0.name: get_asp_non_membership_root

udt_error_enum_v0.doc: Errors that can occur during Groth16 proof verification.
udt_error_enum_v0.name: Groth16Error

cases.doc: The pairing product did not equal identity.
cases.name: InvalidProof

cases.doc: The public inputs length does not match the verification key.
cases.name: MalformedPublicInputs

udt_struct_v0.doc: Groth16 proof composed of points A, B, and C.\nG2 point B uses Soroban's c1||c0 (imaginary||real) ordering.
udt_struct_v0.name: Groth16Proof

fields.doc: Point A
fields.name: a

fields.doc: Point B
fields.name: b

fields.doc: Point C
fields.name: c

udt_struct_v0.doc: Groth16 verification key for BN254 curve (byte-oriented).\nAll G2 points use Soroban's c1||c0 (imaginary||real) ordering.
udt_struct_v0.name: VerificationKeyBytes

fields.doc: Alpha G1 point
fields.name: alpha

fields.doc: Beta G2 point
fields.name: beta

fields.doc: Delta G2 point
fields.name: delta

fields.doc: Gamma G2 point
fields.name: gamma

fields.doc: IC (public input commitments)
fields.name: ic
